title: Traversal
description: A datapack that allows you to traverse between the overworld and the end.
body:
**Warning - Bugs are to be expected - I recommend making a backup of your world before using this mod**

This datapack allows you to quickly access the end in two new ways. But it also allows you to access the overworld easly from the end.

# Features:

**1st Way**

- At y - 650, you will be able to teleport to the end if you have an eye of ender equiped in your hand or offhand.

**2nd Way**

- By combining a ender pearl and end eye, you get the end passage. Allowing you to teleport between the overworld and end when ever, where ever.
